sections.blog: For the latest updates and articles, please visit my blog.

construction.title: I'm glad that you're here, this website is in construction. Work In Progress!
construction.subtitle: Hoped you wouldn't scroll that far, but you did...

items.title: Master's Thesis: Trustworthy LLMs in Industrial Contexts
items.description: Built a vision-based RAG pipeline to generate CAM machining sequences, alongside a custom evaluation framework to ensure AI safety. Leveraged attention layer metrics to guarantee the reliable propagation of data redactions, effectively eliminating hallucinations and safeguarding confidential metadata in industrial deployments.

items.title: Working Student – AI/ML & SafeMLOps
items.description:
Engineered a company-wide SafeMLOps Python template (utilizing Copier and Jinja) to standardize CI/CD, security scanning, and GPU-enabled model training across multiple engineering teams.

Maintained and optimized a U-Net CNN for image segmentation at Siemens Mobility, leveraging DVC and cross-platform dependency management (Poetry) to reduce false positive calls.

Modernized complex legacy codebases and successfully delivered critical model robustness and certification evaluations for the annual Siemens AI Summit.

items.title: Bachelor Thesis - Certification of Model's Robustness against Natural Perturbations
items.description: Completed my Bachelor's thesis on “Model Certification Against Natural Perturbations”, aligned with compliance requirements from the upcoming EU AI Act. The work focused on optimizing and parallelizing methods to determine the extent of natural perturbations that lead to misclassification or segmentation errors.

items.title: Intern Prototype Development
items.description: Evaluation of a new car login concept, NDA. Proof-of-Concept utilizing Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) and a secure AWS-based backend.

items.title: Founder @ ROTOR
items.description:
Founded an organization specializing in the design, refinement, and manufacturing of state-of-the-art FPV and UAV drones.
Built and deployed over 30 custom drones, including advanced hexacopters for professional photography clients.

Registered as a non-profit organization under the French Law of 1 July 1901 (Association Loi 1901).

education.institution: ESIEA - École d'Ingénieur·e·s d'un numérique utile

backend.title: Backend
backend.text: Developed good knowledge of Rust, C, C++, C#, Python, Swift, Kotlin, Java, and Haskell in order to lead the projects that I’ve accomplished. Since a young age, working passionately both in and outside school in various fields such as programming and electronics.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.text: SwiftUI, SpriteKit, JavaScript (CSS), Bootstrap, Angular, JavaFX, React and more…

electronics.title: Electronics
electronics.text: Passionate about prototyping many different things on breadboards and PCBs. DIY lover.

modeling.title: 2D and 3D modeling
modeling.text: Modeling with open-source programs including Blender, Inkscape, and FreeCAD. After finishing modeling, I like to build my creations using 3D Printers, CNC machines, and Laser engravers.
